description_long: This is a two-story modern house situated on a sloped terrain, with a prominent driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a gable roof with dark gray shingles and a light-colored exterior, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete. Large windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front of the house includes a covered porch area supported by columns, and the rear features a balcony or deck overlooking the slope. The property is bordered by a retaining wall, indicating adaptation to the uneven landscape. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, large windows, and a covered porch, set on a sloped lot with a retaining wall and driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house atop a sloped terrain, with the driveway and retaining wall clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear balcony or deck and the full extent of the sloped lot.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the driveway, garage entry, and the slope leading up to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, supported by columns, and a single main door
